acquisition method: The acquisition mode was set as Data-dependent acquisition (DDA).
alkylation reagent: incubated with 25 mM iodoacetamide (IAM) for 0.5 h at room temperature in dark.
alkylation concentration: incubated with 25 mM iodoacetamide (IAM) for 0.5 h at room temperature in dark.
cleavage agent: Protein were extracted and digested with trypsin.
collision energy: Peptides selected for MS/MS analysis using 25% normalized collisional energy (NCE).
enrichment method: the first plant root tissues lysine 2-hydroxyisobutyrylome analysis was performed in wheat with antibody immunoprecipitation affinity.
fractionation method: Then the HPLC fractionation and affinity enrichment procedure were performed to obtain Khib peptides.
fragmentation method: Data acquisition was carried out referring previous report with a Q Exactive (Thermo Scientific) mass spectrometer.
instrument: Data acquisition was carried out referring previous report with a Q Exactive (Thermo Scientific) mass spectrometer.
